title: Not A + B
description: You are required to print a value of $c$ which is not equal to the sum of two given numbers $a$ and $b$.
input: First line contains an integer $t$ --- number of tests. Next $t$ lines contain two integers $a$ and $b$ each.
output: You are required to output an integer $c$ for each test in a separate line. If there are multiple solutions, you may output any of them.
source: Contest, Open Cup, 2018/2019 Season, Stage 18: Grand Prix of Minsk
